authorization_interpretation: Full authority for CallScore clean canonical operationalization, evidence freeze, restore rehearsal, read-only inventory, no-op controlled-full cutover declaration, validation, and commits.

approved_now.scope: freeze ledgers/docs/receipts and commit intended artifacts
read-only verification of D: receipts and Hetzner snapshot; no D writes
temporary staging restore rehearsal under /tmp; no production writes
declare current HH production canonical if validations pass; no restart/deploy/DB write
commit CallScore workplane/app documentation and operational receipts after validation

restricted_not_approved_by_this_receipt.blocked_actions: printing/exposing secrets, raw env values, tokens, cookies, DB URLs, private keys
paid API credits, ads, boosts, paid LLM/SaaS spend
non-owned public posting, public corrections, legal/investment/performance/private-data claims
queue purge, broad DB rewrite/backfill, credential rotation, host rebuild unless rollback trigger fires

public_owned_gtm_policy: Safe owned organic public GTM remains governed by CallScore GTM registry; not invoked by this cutover receipt.
